GenAiPlugin.description: Send notifications to customers regarding the status of their vehicle replacement.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: When there is an update in the vehicle replacement process, send a notification to the customer.
Ensure the notification includes relevant details such as the current status and next steps, if applicable.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only send alerts to customers about the status of their vehicle replacement process. You are not able to handle other types of communication or inquiries.
